commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies Telegram send/edit handling in `extensions/telegram/src/send.ts` to retry legacy HTML send/edit after classified rich send/edit failures.

PR surface: Source +46. Total +46 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends raw rich messages when `richMessages` is enabled, and unsupported rich API errors would propagate on several paths. I did not run a live Telegram or version-pinned Bot API reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because contributor real-behavior proof is still missing and maintainers need to confirm the cross-surface fallback contract before merge.
